name: Lead Generation
description: Multi-channel lead generation campaigns that fill your pipeline with qualified prospects ready to book

benefits.headline: Predictable Lead Flow
benefits.description: Get a predictable flow of qualified leads every week - no more feast or famine cycles

benefits.headline: Pay for Results Only
benefits.description: Only pay for results that matter - leads you can actually convert into paying customers

benefits.headline: Multi-Channel Strategy
benefits.description: Multi-channel campaigns (Google, Facebook, SEO) working together to maximize lead volume

benefits.headline: Complete Lead Management
benefits.description: Complete lead management system - capture, qualify, and nurture leads until they book

pricing_model: Pay per lead or base + performance commission
ideal_for: Businesses ready to scale with consistent lead flow

name: Meta Ads
description: Facebook and Instagram advertising that reaches homeowners and property managers in your service area

benefits.headline: Precise Local Targeting
benefits.description: Target homeowners in specific suburbs who need your services right now

benefits.headline: Build Brand Recognition
benefits.description: Build brand recognition so customers call you first when they need work done

benefits.headline: Retarget Lost Visitors
benefits.description: Retarget website visitors who didn't call - stay top-of-mind until they're ready to book

benefits.headline: Cost-Effective Brand Building
benefits.description: Lower cost per lead than Google Ads while building long-term brand awareness

pricing_model: Fixed investment or percentage of ad spend
ideal_for: Building brand awareness and generating consistent lead flow

name: Google Ads
description: Search advertising that captures high-intent customers actively searching for your services right now

benefits.headline: Dominate Search Results
benefits.description: Appear at the top of Google when customers search for your services in your area

benefits.headline: High-Intent Leads
benefits.description: Capture high-intent leads - people actively looking to hire someone today

benefits.headline: Pay Per Click Only
benefits.description: Only pay when someone clicks - no wasted budget on people who aren't interested

benefits.headline: Complete ROI Tracking
benefits.description: Track every dollar spent and every lead generated - know exactly what you're getting for your money

ideal_for: Businesses wanting immediate visibility and qualified leads

name: Conversion Rate Optimisation
description: Turn more website visitors into phone calls and booked jobs without spending more on advertising

benefits.headline: Maximize Existing Traffic
benefits.description: Get more leads from the same traffic - turn website visitors into phone calls and bookings

benefits.headline: Reduce Wasted Spend
benefits.description: Reduce wasted ad spend by converting more of the clicks you're already paying for

benefits.headline: Data-Driven Testing
benefits.description: A/B test what actually works for your customers - stop guessing, start knowing

benefits.headline: Optimize Every Touchpoint
benefits.description: Improve every touchpoint - from ad click to phone call to booked job

pricing_model: Fixed project or monthly optimization retainer
ideal_for: Businesses getting traffic but not enough conversions

name: Email Marketing
description: Stay top-of-mind with past customers and nurture leads who aren't ready to book yet

benefits.headline: Build Repeat Business
benefits.description: Turn one-time customers into repeat customers - stay in touch for their next project

benefits.headline: Nurture Unconverted Leads
benefits.description: Nurture leads who got a quote but didn't book - automated follow-up until they're ready

benefits.headline: Fill Slow Periods
benefits.description: Seasonal promotions to past customers - fill slow periods with repeat business

benefits.headline: Set and Forget Automation
benefits.description: Automated sequences that run on autopilot - set it up once, generate revenue for years

ideal_for: Building repeat business and nurturing leads

name: Strategy & Consulting
description: Expert marketing guidance for home services businesses without hiring a full-time marketing manager

benefits.headline: Clear Growth Roadmap
benefits.description: Get a clear roadmap from where you are now to your revenue goals - no more guessing

benefits.headline: Fix What's Broken First
benefits.description: Fix what's not working in your current marketing before spending more money

benefits.headline: Industry-Specific Expertise
benefits.description: Expert guidance specific to home services - we know what works for your industry

benefits.headline: Flexible Service Model
benefits.description: Done-for-you or train your team - flexible support that fits your business model

ideal_for: Business owners who want strategic direction
